metadata.description: Agent skill for react-native-nitro-fetch: native fetch, WebSockets, prefetch, cold-start warming, NetworkInspector, Perfetto tracing, TextDecoder, and axios integration.

plugins.name: nitro-fetch
plugins.description: Use whenever an agent is working in a project that uses react-native-nitro-fetch, react-native-nitro-websockets, or react-native-nitro-text-decoder. Covers fetch, prefetching, NitroWebSocket and pre-warming, migrating from RN's built-in WebSocket at the call sites (never by swapping globals), NetworkInspector, native Perfetto / Instruments tracing, NitroTextDecoder, and plugging nitro-fetch into axios via a custom adapter.
